title: Add repository_filter to GitHubProjectConfig for shared-project scoping

tasks.title: Implement `parseGitRemoteUrl(url: string): {owner: string; name: string} | null` pure utility.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added pure GitHub remote parser with support for SSH scp-like, HTTPS, ssh://, .git suffix normalization, and null on unsupported/ambiguous remotes. Added Vitest coverage.
tasks.summary: Added pure GitHub remote parser with support for SSH scp-like, HTTPS, ssh://, .git suffix normalization, and null on unsupported/ambiguous remotes. Added Vitest coverage.

tasks.title: Add `repository_filter: z.string().min(1).optional()` to `GitHubProjectConfigSchema`.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added optional repository_filter to GitHubProjectConfigSchema with min length 1 and schema tests for present, absent, and empty-string rejection.
tasks.summary: Added optional repository_filter to GitHubProjectConfigSchema with min length 1 and schema tests for present, absent, and empty-string rejection.

tasks.title: Plumb `repository_filter` through live read path: `readLiveProject` signature, `adv_roadmap` execute, and `RoadmapSnapshot` type.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added buildProjectItemListArgs with server-side repo query, passed repository_filter from config into live read metadata, added optional RoadmapSnapshot.repository_filter, and surfaced it in adv_roadmap output. Added roadmap tests for unfiltered args, filtered args, and file snapshot transparency.
tasks.summary: Added buildProjectItemListArgs with server-side repo query, passed repository_filter from config into live read metadata, added optional RoadmapSnapshot.repository_filter, and surfaced it in adv_roadmap output. Added roadmap tests for unfiltered args, filtered args, and file snapshot transparency.

tasks.title: Update `/adv-triage` command doc with Phase 0 bootstrap auto-detect, Phase 1 `--query` filter on cached read, and Phase 5 `--query` filter on fresh write-side read.
tasks.verification: Completed adv-triage doc updates for repository_filter.
tasks.summary: Added Phase 0 repository_filter auto-detect protocol with precondition table, Phase 1 --query annotation on `gh project item-list`, Phase 5 server-side scoping note requiring matching --query on the fresh read, and snapshot schema example showing optional `repository_filter` mirror field. All updates anchored with rq-repoFilter01.
